name: Steak-Vegetable Pockets
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut boneless steak into bite-size strips.
2. Heat a wok or large skillet with cooking oil over high heat.
3. Add broccoli, carrot, onion, and green pepper; stir-fry for 7 minutes.
4. Add pea pods, mushrooms, and chopped tomato; stir-fry for 2 minutes.
5. Remove vegetables from the pan.
6. Add more cooking oil to the pan; return to high heat.
7. Stir-fry beef in hot oil for 3 minutes.
8. In a bowl, mix 1/4 cup cold water with soy sauce and cornstarch until smooth.
9. Pour the mixture into the pan; stir until bubbly.
10. Return vegetables to the pan; heat through.
11. Spoon the mixture into halved pita bread rounds.
